The Problem

Most of us are running on
empty without knowing it.

Modern life is exhausting. We’re under constant pressure — work, screens, busy schedules. Even when we try to sleep, our minds won’t switch off. Our muscles ache. Our energy is gone.

What most people don’t realise is that magnesium — one of the most important minerals for your body — is missing from most modern diets. On top of that, poor gut health and a weakened immune system are increasingly common, draining your energy and resilience without you even knowing it.

“Up to 50% of people in developed countries don’t get enough magnesium from food alone.”
😮‍💨

Constant Stress

Feeling anxious, tense, or overwhelmed — even when nothing big is happening.

😴

Poor Sleep

Lying awake at night, waking up tired, unable to fully switch off.

⚡

Low Energy

That heavy, sluggish feeling that coffee doesn’t really fix.

💪

Slow Recovery

Muscle aches that linger, soreness that takes longer than it should.

The Solution

One natural habit.
Real, simple support.

1

Magnesium Malate + 5 Superfoods

We combine magnesium malate with pumpkin seed, cacao, spirulina, and maca root — a blend designed to support energy, mood, gut health, and recovery all in one capsule.

2

One Capsule a Day. That’s It.

No complicated routines. Take one capsule each evening before bed, and let it work overnight while your body rests and restores itself.

3

Affordable Enough to Stay Consistent

Health habits only work when you can keep them. We price Vital Seed fairly — because consistency is what actually makes the difference.

What You’ll Notice

Four ways Vital Seed
supports your daily life.

🌙

Better Sleep

Magnesium malate and maca root work together to help relax your nervous system, making it easier to fall asleep and wake up feeling genuinely refreshed.

🧘

Less Stress & Better Mood

Cacao and magnesium support serotonin production and your stress response. Many people notice they feel calmer and more balanced within a few weeks.

💪

Energy & Recovery

Magnesium malate is specifically known for supporting sustained energy and reducing muscle fatigue — ideal whether you train hard or just have a busy day.

✨

Gut & Immune Health

Spirulina and pumpkin seed powder bring powerful natural support for your immune system and gut health — benefits most magnesium supplements simply don’t offer.

FAQ

Common questions, answered.

Magnesium is a mineral your body needs for hundreds of everyday functions — including regulating sleep, managing stress, supporting muscle function, and keeping your nervous system balanced. Most people don’t get enough of it from food alone.
We recommend taking one capsule in the evening, around 30–60 minutes before bed. Magnesium supports relaxation and sleep, so taking it at night helps your body make the most of it. You can also take it with food if your stomach is sensitive.
Yes. Vital Seed contains a standard, well-studied dose of magnesium bisglycinate — one of the gentlest and best-absorbed forms available. It’s safe for daily use for most healthy adults. If you have any medical conditions or take regular medication, check with your doctor first.
Everyone is different. Some people notice better sleep within the first week. For others it can take 2–4 weeks of consistent use. The key is staying consistent — that’s why we offer a one-month supply.
We ship worldwide from Lithuania. EU customers: 3–5 business days. International orders: 1–2 weeks. You’ll receive a confirmation email once dispatched.
We keep things simple. Natural sources, a clean formula with no unnecessary additives, honest pricing, and plain communication. We’re not here to confuse or impress you — just to offer something that works at a price you can maintain long-term.
Vital Seed is suitable for adults from 16 years and up. If you’re under 18, we recommend checking with a parent or GP before starting any new supplement.
Email us at [email protected] and we’ll reply within 24 hours. Not happy within 14 days? We’ll give you a full refund — no questions asked.
🛡️

14-Day Money Back Guarantee

We believe in Vital Seed completely. If you try it and aren’t happy for any reason, contact us within 14 days and we’ll give you a full refund. No questions asked.
